category_sources: source_facts.description says free Hebrew linguistic project; official Hspell homepage says the project creates a free Hebrew spell-checker and morphological analyzer.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is hspell; official homepage title and text use Hspell.
docs_sources: Official homepage is the primary project documentation surface and links documents; official HOWTO gives application configuration instructions.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage provides source archive downloads but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes Hebrew spell-checking, morphological analysis, algorithms, and dictionaries; source_facts.executables lists hspell, hspell-i, and multispell.
